biomechanicalMeaning: Twisting load about a tissue or joint axis
clinicalInterpretationBoundary: Not interchangeable with a directional rotation stress

biomechanicalMeaning: Rotation-related mechanical stress when direction is unresolved
clinicalInterpretationBoundary: Prefer internal or external rotation when the source resolves direction
